$description: Proteus iconography — Material Symbols Rounded (Google, Apache-2.0 variable font; axes FILL, wght, GRAD, opsz). Web: name via Google Fonts or the `material-symbols` npm package. Figma: Material Symbols plugin. Sizes and axis defaults below; components pick a size token, never a literal icon px.

weight.$description: wght 100–700. Min 200 at 24px; never the lightest at standard size.

grade.$description: GRAD: -25 for light icons on dark (Proteus default, dark-first). Use 0 for dark-on-light.

opticalSize.$description: opsz 20–48 — set to the icon's rendered px so the stroke stays optically correct (clamp 16px sizes to opsz 20).
